entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne May '24 reflections
entry.content:
Last month we had our second Melbourne Stammtisch for 2024. It was a little while ago, but it's better late than never as they say 🙂

We held the event at the same location which provided the same great atmosphere and food and drinks as last time and now we are starting to get some sense of regularity, after all the idea is a SAP regulars' table.

The event was held after the Mastering SAP conference so it was a good chance to discuss topics raised for those who attended. Also it was a welcome privilege to have been joined by @thomas_jung while he was in town and get some thoughts from his perspective as well.

This was another great chance to dig into the big ideas of the SAP ecosystem and just to chat and get to know fellow members of the community.

Please leave your comments on what you want, what you enjoyed about the Melbourne Stammtisch and lets aim to meet up in July to keep the momentum.

 

 

Ben.

entry.title: Re: 0MB memory and 0 routes on Cloud Foundry trial account
entry.content: If anyone is still facing this issues the solution is to add service Cloud Foundry Runtime in your entitlements

entry.title: Re: CAP: Unbound Action with implicit parameter and confirmation dialog.
entry.content:
Hi @gwerner,

Can you please share your solution? I also need to hide this dialog.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Send mail service not working
entry.content:
@naveenvishal

I've never used Mailtrap, but it seems to be the expected behavior.

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/56385227/i-cant-get-emails-to-my-inbox-even-though-i-can-see-a-successful-transaction-i

entry.title: Re: ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) for Developers in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Alfonso,

do you try to execute in ADT in Eclipse on the central ATC system (7.58) the central ATC run over the remote 7.40 system or do you use ADT in Eclipse on your 7.40 system and remote check variant from the central ATC system (7.58)?

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Production order confirmation via custom design
entry.content:
Hi Dominik, Thanks for the clarification.

Transient locking errors - this feature is already in use.

Material movements posting errors - we can consider this also.

Permanent or semi-permanent errors - there is a question. We can not reprodue CO1P entry for test purposes and can not check what we have in BAPI with CO1P. Is it known if the BAPI return something, which says that it is related to CO1P? Not to lock error, not to COGI etc. But particularly to CO1P. Or we are able to check whether the posting was done or not only after Confirmation was completed?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring business user utilization report
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly let us know is there any application to view the business user utilization (what are all the application used how frequently used and when the business user used the particular application) of the S4 PERSON_NAME public cloud system.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring business user util...
entry.content:
The Real User Monitoring app has its own built-in help interface which describes the usage of the various views/tabs available in the app.
The built-in help interface can be opened by clicking the relevant icon ("?" in a circle) at the top right of the app page. 

Some apps that align with your criteria are:

  • The "Requests Overview" view/tab in the Real User Monitoring app allows you to see all requests/actions executed in your monitored systems based on the request type, including by the technical application/request name. You can drill down into each request to see more details about the actions the user took for the request/app, with timestamps and other information.
    If you need to filter data based on specific services/systems, you must make an appropriate selection in the "Scope" area of the Real User Monitoring app.
  • The "Analysis" view/tab in the Real User Monitoring app allows you to see End-2-End response times, with dimensions including the application/request name. 
  • The "Execution Flow" view/tab allows you to see detailed info about the actions of a user and the corresponding system response, in chronological order. 

Experiment with the various views/tabs on offer to identify the one that best meets your needs.

If none of the existing views/tabs meet your needs, custom dashboards or tools can be created from scratch using SAP Cloud ALM data, by consuming it using the various SAP Cloud ALM REST APIs.

entry.title: Re: Virtual element not refreshed on Save RAP SAP
entry.content:
Hi @santosh_fhalke , 

you need side effect annotations for this, cf https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/18b17bdd49d1436fa9172cbb01e26544 .

Regards,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Change WSDL Endpoint in XML via SOAMANAGER did not work permanently
entry.content:
From external the soap interface should be available. We have on the public address an load balancer, webdispatcher and at the end the ERP System NW 750. All running in SAP RISE.

But in the buttom of the xml file I cannot change the url from internal to public in the soap:address location tag.

In the table HTTPURLLOC I can change the domain but not the port to https.

If I use the Alternative URL or Reverse Proxy the config could not saved and in another session the settings are gone. I try this also with publish service. SCC4 is open for changes.

There are some new notes 1849044 and 2993185 from the last two months – but did not helped.

Any ideas ?

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Batch Management, Decentralised EWM
entry.content: Thanks Shailesh, Will try this option and hope will meet my requirement

entry.title: Issue with address inconsistencies when synchronizing Employee to Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, I have been requested to solve an issue related to a BP in S4 on premise.

To give context: We had a BP not synchronized correctly with its employee number (from PA30).

Our functional team executed RSUID_REMOVE_FALSE_BP_ASGN to unlink them and when executing /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE to generate a new BP and link it with the employee number we received the following 2 error logs:

Message R1000 "Error_Time Dependency_Addresses ADVW_VALIDITY_ERROR"

Message R11245 "Error for validity periods of address usages"

I have checked the address' validity periods in the HR master (PA30) and the BP and they match, also I have checked BUT020, ADRC and PA0006 tables and they match too. 

Reading sap note 2578294, it suggests to review the path "Cross-Application Components=>SAP Business Partner=>Business Partner=>Basic Settings=>Address Determination" and make sure the address type XXDEFAULT is set on "Assign Transaction to Address Type", and it is. Also I have checked sap notes 2517507 and 2598468, but they cannot be implemented in the system. 

Going on, we have executed again /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE but with the flag "Override Banks, addresses and roles" and it gives us a different error log:

Message no. AM266 Personal address not deleted; other reference exists.

Searching for it I have found this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-questions/bupa-del-error/qaq-p/10741420, it says that the error generally occurs for the addresses  of table BCST_CAM, I have checked it and there isn't any entry for the employee number, could that be the problem? Going trough note 835936, I have executed RSBCS_ADDRESS_REFERENCE, but it says that there isn't any reference. 

Does someone know what else can I do? Or how should I proceed? 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) for Developers in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

I execute the ATC in Eclipse from the 7.58 SAP System by using a check variant in 7.58 that contains the check Syntax Check in Remote System that points to the 7.40 SAP System.


I've also extracted the log from the Eclipse ABAP Communication Log:

Thank you,
Alfonso.

entry.title: Re: Errors in standard CDS view C_PRODUCT
entry.content:
We solved the error by reverting object to previous state in Version management.

It happened to us because original version (the newest version) was overwritten by the old version during upgrade transport.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David and everyone,

I just wanted to say that my learning journey with SAP has been challenging. I initially joined a bootcamp last year to study SAP implementation (public cloud) with activate and I quickly discovered that there are many technical aspects and concepts regarding SAP that take time to fully absorb, understand and become accustomed with. I am happy that I have stuck with it and I look forward to passing my certification attempt and applying for consultant roles with SAP. Thanks all

 

Stuart

I would greatly appreciate any assistance or insights on resolving this matter.

Thank you.

entry.title: Stock transfer for stock type using /scwm/adgi
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,
I`m facing a situation and I couldn`t find anything related to it. This is my first question ever assigned in here.
We are using EWM decentralized with ECC.
Current situation: 
We do from time to time manual goods issue posting to an ECC storage location using /scwm/adgi
Issue: 
Users are able to select and post stocks with stock type S2.

How can I limit posting goods issue using tcode /scwm/adgi to ECC storage locations? 
For stock type Q2 if we do goods issue posting we receive a queue entry.

Best regards,
Sorin

entry.title: Re: How to find an API on SAP S/4HANA OP (EN)
entry.content:
Remember, there is no such thing as "on-premise" in real English.
"Premise" is a concept.
"Premises" is a location.

"https://collectivecontent.agency/2018/04/19/should-i-say-on-premise-or-on-premises-it/"

And Token URL : (uaa.url) https://{}.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
And Client ID : uaa.clientid
And clientsecret : uaa.clientsecret

I have added to my user the Process 
I can trigger workflows from the Monitoring instance with my user

entry.title: Re: How to implement Onboarding 2.0 without Employee Cent...
entry.content: RCM

entry.title: How do I adjust Fiori login error messages texts?
entry.content:
Hey folks,

I am developing a custom Fiori Launchpad login screen and a part of the requirements is to have slightly different error descriptions instead of the default ones ("Enter your user", "Enter a password", etc.), as on the following screenshot:

I have adjusted the login procedure as per various known guides, i.e., modified login procedure in SICF, created my custom class that inherits from /UI2/CL_SRA_LOGIN, made some tweaks in html templates, css files, INIT_DEFAULT_PROPERTIES method of my custom class, etc. - no problems with that. But it turned out that message texts aren't accessible from /UI2/CL_SRA_LOGIN or its descendants. I made some research and found out that those texts are fetched in private method 'LOAD_TEXT' of class CL_ICF_SYSTEM_LOGIN, which is a parent class of /UI2/CL_SRA_LOGIN, and the texts are pulled from textpool of that class (namely, texts 041 and 042). Since this method is private, I can't redefine it and modify the texts... Unfortunately, debugging of login screens is also quite complicated, as runtime execution is happening on client 000 (because we're not even logged in to any "normal" clients yet) and I don't have proper authorizations to do that.

Do you guys maybe know (or had the same problem) if there's a way to modify such texts? Any suggestions are welcome, even "dirty" ones.

entry.title: BI Commentary Application - DB and schema?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I want to explore the Commentary Application for my Webi Reports.

I see per default it's selected the Audit DB as the DB to store comments.

1) Do you know under what schema are these comments stored?

2) If I decided to choose a different DB, like HANA DB...in the options it gives to setup the connection (server, port, user, pwd...) I don't see mention to schema...do you know what schema name will it create in my HANA DB?

Thanks, best regards

Victor Torreblanca

entry.title: Re: select option for given range
entry.content: It's only during the execution of the program that you may add SELECT ... WHERE lifnr IN SO_LIFNR and lifnr between '0000001000' and '0000002000', not in the select-options itself.

The requirement is strange to me as there is a standard functionality to implement it. But if you insist on reinventing the wheel you can use MM_PUR_S4_PO_POST or ME_PURCHDOC_POSTED BAdI enhancement to sent emails from purchase orders.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: sapui5 application deploy error
entry.content:
nice, thank you for your recommendation. 
regards.

entry.title: Re: Production order confirmation via custom design
entry.content:
Hello @alex_alex85 

I think we are mixing two different topics here:

  1. Decoupling Processes Carried out During Confirmation and 
  2. Reprocessing Confirmations

Decoupling Processes Carried out During Confirmation Decoupled processes are posted with CO1P. Decoupling is implemented to improve performance - a production confirmation can be saved quickly and the resulting processes e.g. cost determination can be posted later on. Such a confirmation is saved perfectly correctly even if it creates coupled operation for later posting. In that case BAPI shouldn't report any errors. Naturally, users need to be trained about decoupling, so they are not surprised that they see material movements or actual costs right after they save a confirmation.

Decoupling is customizable and I don't think you can tell if a confirmation will yield decoupled operations with the BAPI test run or before the BAPI is called and the confirmation is actually saved.

Reprocessing Confirmations That is the error pool I referred to in my previous posting. Errors are reprocessed with CO16N. Faulty confirmation are saved to the pool if the BAPI is called with POST_WRONG_ENTRIES = 1 or 2. If the BAPI is called with wrong data, that will result in an error, that can be checked with a test run. Notice, that the test run won't lock orders, so potential locking problems can't be verify this way.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to activate scope item 4X9 in S/4 HANA 2023 on-pr...

entry.title: Re: F2388 Monitor payments: Batch exist but payments not...
entry.content:
Try Maintaining following Authorizations in your User ID

 

ObjectFieldValue
F_REGU_BUKFBTCH23,26
F_REGU_KOAKOART* (All)
F_PAYRQORIGIN* (All)
F_PAYRQACTVT03
F_BL_BANKBUKRSCompany Code
F_BL_BANKHBKID* (All)
F_BL_BANKHKTID* (All)
F_BL_BANKZLSCH* (All)
F_BL_BANKACTVT03
P_ABAPCOARS2
P_ABAPREPIDRFMPAY00
F_LFA1_APPACTVT03
F_LFA1_APPAPPKZF
F_LFA1_BUKACTVT03
F_LFA1_BUKBUKRSCompany Code
F_BNK_RSNDACTVT01
S_BTCH_ADMBTCADMINY, D

entry.title: Re: select option for given range
entry.content: Instead using the standard data element you can use an own data element with an own domain containing only these values.

entry.title: Initial Balance Upload in One Exposure from Operations.
entry.content:
How to see the initial balances for the bank account in One Exposure from Operation?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Initial Balance Upload in One Exposure from Operations.
entry.content:
Define the memo record types in the SSCUI "Define Memo Record Types  (ID 101029 )".

Use the App Manage Memo records 2.0 to create the Actual cash memo records to create the initial balances for the Bank Accounts. Use the memo record type "Actual Cash Memo."

Help Portal Links: -

Manage Memo Records 2.0

Import Memo Records 2.0

 

Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: LMS ODATA API Pagination Issue with /catalog-service Endpoint
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm encountering a significant issue with the LMS ODATA API for the catalog-service.

Problem Description:

  • Endpoint:  /learning/odatav4/public/admin/catalog-service/v1/CatalogsFeed('ALL')/CoursesFeed
  • Behavior: The endpoint returns a maximum of 1000 records.
  • Pagination Issues: The parameters startRecordNumber and endRecordNumber do not seem to work. Additionally, skip and top parameters also not working.

The issue with pagination appears to be applicable to all navigation properties under the catalog-service. Despite trying various criteria for pagination, none seem to function as intended. We cannot retrieve more than 1000 records, and there are no clear means to paginate the results.

Attempts:

  • Using startRecordNumber and endRecordNumber to manually paginate.
  • Combining different filters to limit data size in hopes of effective pagination.

Example of the Requests Tried:

  • /CoursesFeed?$filter=criteria/localeID eq 'EN'&criteria/startRecordNumber eq 0&criteria/endRecordNumber eq 999
  • /CoursesFeed?$filter=criteria/localeID eq 'EN'&criteria/startRecordNumber eq 1000&criteria/endRecordNumber eq 1999

None of these approaches have succeeded in paginating the results or retrieving more than the 1000-record limit.

Request for Help:

  • Clarification: Is there any existing method or parameter that we are missing to paginate results beyond the 1000-record limit using the current API?
  • Workaround: Any known workarounds or best practices to handle large datasets with this API?

Any guidance or assistance would be greatly appreciated as this limitation is critically impacting our operations.

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Process Automation Desktop Agent for MAC
entry.content:
Hi. It didn't work. SAP Case 661465/2024 created.

JV

entry.title: Not possible to display SAC Live BW Query Texts in German or Englisch ???
entry.content:
Hi,

its Impossible and not supported to display SAC Live BW Query Texts in German or Englisch depending on
the User session - that would be pretty poor???

Need to know how to display SAP BW Live Query Texts multilinagual, in EN or DE ...:

  • In comes a BW Query with Labels in EN or DE:
  • Need to display in the SAC the labels in EN and/or DE like above

Measures to achieve this:
- setting the SAC Enviroment  User Preferences andLogOn/LogOf - wont help:

- setting or changeing  the Browser Enviroment - wont help:

  • Setting the Connections language to De or EN does it - but redicioulos solution:

Any Suggestions ?
Thank You !

Best Martin

entry.title: FWZZ We need a new Interest Calculation Method for bonds, we 180/360
entry.content:
Hi TRM experts

Is it possible to include /create a new interest calclulation method? = 180/360

Or we can use J m+act/360 ?? How is work this method?

Thanks for your advice

Regards

entry.title: Re: select option for given range
entry.content:
I would add a hidden criteria in the where clause of the following select so

 

AND LIFNR IN SO_LIFNR
AND LIFNR BETWEEN '0000001000' AND '0000002000'

 

Else you could check the Select-Option input to check LOW and HIGH values, very basic for values and range list  (I/EQ, I/BT) but how will you handle except and wildcards (e.g. '*11*') NB: You can prevent those case with FM SELECT_OPTIONS_RESTRICT.

 

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON SO_LIFNR.
  LOOP AT SO_LIFNR.
    " do some check, raise error if you must

entry.title: How to reverse a CO document if KB14N and KB64 are not working?
entry.content:
Transaction KB14N (Reverse Manual Repostings of Primary Costs) is not working for a CO documents which have external references (Message error BK185). Also transaction KB64 is not working for that.

Is there any chance to create a CO reversal document starting from a CO one without reversing the FI original document and avoiding any manual entry other than the selection of the data for identifying the reference document?

entry.title: Not possible to display SAC Live BW Query Texts in German or Englisch ???

Hi,

- setting or changeing  the Browser Enviroment - wont help:

entry.title: Re: Activity rate calculation
entry.content:
Hi Abid,

Not sure which allocation process you are referring. Please let me know T code which I can use

entry.title: Re: FWZZ We need a new Interest Calculation Method for bo...
entry.content:
More info: we are creating a new Bond in fwzz and its neccesary include intereeset calculation method 180/360

How can we solve this request

Thanks

entry.title: can PRIVSUM be greater than MEMSUM ?
entry.content:
I have the function module SWNC_GET_WORKLOAD_SNAPSHOT , having the table MEMORY, I see column PRIVSUM having the value  1.518.048  and MEMSUM having 1.404.915 

Can PRIVSUM be greater than MEMSUM ?

entry.title: Service Explorer application in Cloud ALM retired
entry.content:
Background Information

Previously, Cloud ALM for Service contained an application called "Service Explorer". In time when the list of upcoming services was not yet known inside Cloud ALM for Service, purpose of this application was to check whether the customer had a service delivery for an SAP Operations Health Check or an SAP Accelerated Optimization Service scheduled and, in case such a service delivery was scheduled, to allow access to analysis tools required for the delivery of these two services. 

Since the introduction of the Service Delivery Center it is no longer required to have a separate application for verifying if a customer has a specific service delivery scheduled. This can simply be verified by checking the list of service deliveries available in the Service Delivery Center.

Additionally, access to all analysis tools relevant for customers now happens via the respective service delivery details in the Service Delivery Center. Thus, it is not necessary to have a separate application to provide access to these tools.

Since the functions that were previously contained the in Service Explorer app are now available in the Service Delivery Center, the Service Explorer app has been retired.

What you need to do

Nothing. Just be aware that there is no longer a tile called "Service Explorer".

entry.title: SQL Server add link server and select data from SAP function SWNC_COLLECTOR_GET_AGGREGATES
entry.content:
Hello, I would like to use SQL Server Management Studio to import SAP data
The data source is SAP RFC function SWNC-COLLECTOR_Get-AGGREGATES

Regards,

Saurav Agarwal

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 DOES NOT ALLOW ME TO CREATE NEW COMPANY
entry.content: Hi, thank you for you answer. I have reviewed the version of SAP HANNA for Windows and I have version 2.1.19. The version of SAP HANNA installed on Linux is 2.3.10. The version of our SAP B1 client is: 9.2.160 PL06. What could I do? Would there be a way to create the Society in Linux directly?

entry.title: Re: How to implement custom number range for Invoices for...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can you try this if this works in your scenario?

Based on the user's requirement, the BAdI 'SD_BIL_FLEX_NUMBERING' can be used to implement a custom number range for the Invoices for rent. This BAdI allows for a flexible allocation of billing documents to number range intervals and prefixes that is controlled by one or more attributes (header fields) of the billing document to be created.

Here is a sample ABAP code snippet that can be used to implement the custom number range:

```ABAP
METHOD if_sd_bil_flex_numbering~det_nr_interval.
DATA: lv_billing_type TYPE vbrk-fkart.

"Get the billing document type
lv_billing_type = bil_doc-billingdocumenttype.

"Check if the billing document type is for Invoices for rent
IF lv_billing_type EQ 'RNT'. "Assuming 'RNT' is the billing document type for Invoices for rent
"Set the custom number range interval and prefix
numberrangeinterval = 'RNT1'. "Assuming 'RNT1' is the custom number range interval for Invoices for rent
numberrangeprefix = 'RNT'. "Assuming 'RNT' is the custom number range prefix for Invoices for rent
ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.
```

In this code snippet, we first get the billing document type from the import parameter 'bil_doc'. Then we check if the billing document type is for Invoices for rent. If it is, we set the custom number range interval and prefix to 'RNT1' and 'RNT' respectively. These values are assumed for this example and should be replaced with the actual values as per your requirement.

Please note that you need to define the custom number range interval and prefix in the relevant configuration activities before using them in the BAdI implementation. Also, make sure to assign the routine number to the billing document type for which you want to trigger the BAdI implementation.

Best Regards,

Harish Mangtani

entry.title: SAP CPI : How to get list of undeployed artifacts of a package via API
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on a custom UI5 app to display a list of all the undeployed artifacts from a specific package using the Integration Content API present on API Hub. I am not able to find any API which fetches the list of all the undeployed artifacts for a specific package.

API Hub - https://api.sap.com/api/IntegrationContent/resource/Integration_Flow

Can someone please help me how to achieve this?

Thanks,
Sagar Bansal

entry.title: Re: Stock transfer for stock type using /scwm/adgi
entry.content:
Hello @SorinMoldovan 

/SCWM/ADGI is implemented with the /SCWM/RGI_SCRAP report. Stock type is SO_CAT select option. The selection parameters are verified with the CHECK_SELECTION form routine.

You could add an implicit enhancement at the end of the routine, validate SO_CAT and throw an error message if a user selects a stock type, they are not supposed to touch.

Alternatively you can implement the /SCWM/EX_CORE_GM_STOCK BAdI enhancement to validate stock postings. 

I think the latter approach is better, as it is less invasive.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Assign Fiori processes to the user HCMFAB_STARTPROCESS/011
entry.content:

When I try to Start Process in fiori HCP app, I get HCMFAB_STARTPROCESS/011 error.

I activated the HCMFAB_START_PROCESS_SRV service.

I wonder what could have gone wrong?

Thank you 

Roger

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add an attachment to an email via c...
entry.content:
Hello Hemanth.B,

Unfortunately this is not possible. You can only provide links to your documents.

Best regards,
Marc

entry.title: Re: How is standard number range migration handled (from...
entry.content:
Hello, 

For standard business objects like Sales Order or Purchase Order, the number ranges are usually predefined in the system and are not automatically migrated or created with the latest number range interval.

The number range intervals for these standard business objects need to be manually maintained via the Fiori app.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Relationship icon to view idocs is inactive on sales order & Generic IDOC screen
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I have maintained the Parameter 'SD_SWU_ACTIVE' using SU3. I'm able to see the generic IDOC & Sales Order viceversa using this parameter. But for the ASAPIO Generic IDOC which is having Basic type '/ASADEV/ACI_GENERIC_IDOC' I'm not able to see the relationship between Sales Order & Generic IDOC in SAP. 

Kindly look into it & help me. 

Regards, 

Rahul More

entry.title: Re: How to send Emails with Attachments in SAP Marketing...
entry.content:
Hello Hemanth.B,

This is currently not possible. You can only provide links to your documents.

Best regards,
Marc

entry.title: Yes, we have already maintained distribution rules as per the given steps.
entry.content:
Hi Ken_Melching,

I hope you are doing well.

We have already maintained distribution rules as per the given steps, but the error persists: "Line item settlement is not possible for asset 10 10000008." Additionally, we have checked the CBC configurations in the Define Asset Class, and found that the Line Item Settlement field is grayed out and uneditable.

Could you please suggest a resolution for this issue.

Regards,

Chandan

entry.title: Re: Activity rate calculation
entry.content: You can use KB21N to transfer costs from the Service Cost Centre to the Production Cost Centre. If the costs are distributed across multiple GL accounts, then utilize KSU01 and KSU05, and employ the Manage Allocation Fiori app to allocate by creating Allocation Cycles.

entry.title: Re: Secure File Exchange Using SAP NetWeaver PI - the Big Picture
entry.content:
Remember, there is no such thing as "on-premise" in real English.
"Premise" is a concept.
"Premises" is a location.

"https://collectivecontent.agency/2018/04/19/should-i-say-on-premise-or-on-premises-it/"

 

Thanks for the blog.

entry.title: How to Use 'document-service' API to Upload Documents into Sales & Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Sales & Service Cloud v2 offers REST APIs for all the entities(Ex : "case", "opportunity", "account" etc) supported in its business model. One of them is "document-service" which is used to handle the attachments in the system. Document-Service offers an API which can be used to create and link the documents as attachments to the standard entities(Ex : "case" ; "appointment" ; "account" etc) in the system.

In this blog, let's check how to use document-service api offered by Sales & Service Cloud v2 to upload the documents into the tenant and then link them to the entity of your choice.

Below is the pictorial view of how the API works.

 

Step 1 : Do a POST Call with file name and category
Request URL : https://*****crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/document-service/documents 
Json Body :

 

{
"fileName": "Document_service.png",
"category": "DOCUMENT"
}

 

Response : 
Response will return the metadata object , with ID & Upload url. You can observe the "hostObjectType" as user which means the document is first uploaded into "user" space. 

 

{
	"value": {
		"id": "933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0",
		"title": "Document_service.png",
		"fileName": "Document_service.png",
		"category": "DOCUMENT",
		"status": "OPEN",
		"thumbnailStatus": "NOT_PROCESSED",
		"fileSize": 0,
		"uploadUrl": "https://***************amazonaws.com/documents/5d94e446cd3cdc6f7c324c50/user/abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752/933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0/Document_service.png?***********",
		"adminData": {
			"createdBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
			"createdOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z",
			"updatedBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
			"updatedOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z"
		},
		"hostObjectId": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
		"hostObjectType": "user",
		"icon": "file_general",
		"color": "grey"
	}
}

 

Step 2 : Next you have to do PUT Call to the above URL - to upload the file. No need of any authentication, just upload the file.
Request URL: 
https://***************amazonaws.com/documents/5d94e446cd3cdc6f7c324c50/user/abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752/933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0/Document_service.png?*********** 

Response  : Document will be uploaded into user space - status would be 200K with NO RESPONSE. 

STEP 3 (Optional) : You can do GET call again to verify the status of document 

Request URL : https://*****crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/document-service/documents/933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0

Response : Observe the document status changed from "OPEN" to "ACTIVE" , thumbnail status(only relevant for attachments of image type) changed from "NOT_PROCESSED" to "PROCESSED".

 

{
	"value": {
		"id": "933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0",
		"title": "Document_service.png",
		"fileName": "Document_service.png",
		"category": "DOCUMENT",
		"status": "ACTIVE",
		"thumbnailStatus": "PROCESSED",
		"contentType": "image/png",
		"fileSize": 311675,
		"adminData": {
			"createdBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
			"createdOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z",
			"updatedBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
			"updatedOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z"
		},
		"hostObjectId": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
		"hostObjectType": "user"
	}
}

 

Step 4 : Next you have to do PATCH call on the service of respective entity to link the document. I have taken "case-service" as example, so that i can link the uploaded document to an existing case in the system.

Request URL : https://*****crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/case-service/cases/4449a27a-1819-11ef-a2df-7982199a6240

Json Body : 

 

{
	"attachments": [
		{
			"id": "933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0"
		}
	]
}

 

Response : Looks like below ***trimmed to only show case details and attachments node*** 

 

{
	"value": {
		"id": "4449a27a-1819-11ef-a2df-7982199a6240",
		"displayId": "505",
		"subject": "Timeline Testing on Case",
		"priority": "03",
		"priorityDescription": "Medium",
		"origin": "MANUAL_DATA_ENTRY",
		"originDescription": "Manual Data Entry",
		"caseType": "ZCASE",
		"caseTypeDescription": "Z Case Type",
		"statusSchema": "01",
		"partyScheme": "CASE_GENERAL",
		"status": "02",
		"statusDescription": "In Process",
		"escalationStatus": "NOT_ESCALATED",
		"communicationLanguage": "en",
		"isRecommendedCommunicationLanguage": false,
		"attachments": [
			{
				"id": "933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0",
				"category": "DOCUMENT",
				"title": "Document_service.png",
				"fileName": "Document_service.png",
				"fileSize": 311675,
				"contentType": "image/png",
				"status": "ACTIVE",
				"adminData": {
					"createdOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z",
					"createdBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
					"updatedOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z",
					"updatedBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752"
				}
			}
		]
	}
}

 

Step 5(Optional) : You can now do a GET call with document id to ensure it is linked to the case and moved from user space to destination entity space. 

Request URL : https://*****crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/document-service/documents/933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0

Response : You can observe hostObjectType is changed as 2886 which means case. 

 

{
	"value": {
		"id": "933cc1e0-2199-11ef-ac53-5b1803e1f4b0",
		"title": "Document_service.png",
		"fileName": "Document_service.png",
		"category": "DOCUMENT",
		"status": "ACTIVE",
		"thumbnailStatus": "PROCESSED",
		"contentType": "image/png",
		"fileSize": 311675,
		"adminData": {
			"createdBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
			"createdOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z",
			"updatedBy": "abf4a353-ea15-11e9-8fa7-f92a516fe752",
			"updatedOn": "2024-06-03T11:08:15.572Z"
		},
		"hostObjectId": "4449a27a-1819-11ef-a2df-7982199a6240",
		"hostObjectType": "2886"
	}
}

 

Important Points to Consider : 

  • Without uploading the document(PUT call) one should not do the patch call to particular entity - the call fails
  • "uploadURL" returned from the first POST call is presigned and is valid only for 10 mins. There is no need of authentication while you PUT this.
  • Mime types and Document size of attachments are configurable in the system at User Menu => Settings => Data Administration under "MIME Types for Attachments" & "Attachment Configuration". Check this whole section of Data Administration for more useful information before you start using attachments.
  • The header parameter "Content-Type"  is automatically added if the PUT call happens via Postman or Insomnia. If programmatically done, this needs to be passed manually
  • Doing a PATCH call needs the parameter "If-Match" which is the last modified date of that particular document. This can be found in the RESPONSE header of the GET call done on the respective document with name "etag"

entry.title: Re: Activity rate calculation
entry.content: KB21N or KSU5 will bring cost to prod cost center which we don't want. Activity rate should be calculated looking at cost in service cost center and hours in prod cost center. We recommended custom solution for this requirement but wanted to check if there is any standard solution

entry.title: Replicate Business Partner Address from SAP ERP : OBJ_TYPE is filtered on BUS1006001.
entry.content:
In the standard iflow 'Replicate Business Partner Address from SAP ERP' and in the mapping 'ERP_COD_BusinessPartnerERPAddressBulkReplicateRequest' BusinessPartnerERPAddressReplicateRequestMessage field is mapped to OBJ_TYPE when it is not equal to BUS1006001

However the ADRMAS03 IDOC generated as same OBJ_TYPE. and thus the iflow fails.

Does this require extra configuration on SAP side to set a different OBJ_TYPE?

entry.title: Re: Speeding up your SAP HCM move to the cloud in 2024 - Part 3: SAP HCM ROI Calculator
entry.content: Great blog and GAME CHANGING tool! again and again, a repeat comment to HR transformation is how difficult it may appear to be accounting for the benefits - now it is a matter of a few clicks to get a first draft!

entry.title: Re: Working with SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Add-on, for Utilities
entry.content: Thanks @steen_hansen for these details. It helps a lot. However, apart from these enhancement spots do we have anything with reference to alerts functionality for utilities in service cloud version 2? Example - The standard interface available in V1 - Utilities Alerts Get.

entry.title: Re: Upload initial balances data in group reporting
entry.content:
Hello ,

please refer to the following presentation and recording. This might help to answer your question. 

Best regards

How to Adopt Group Reporting in Public Cloud - Accounting

Date: May 14, 2024

Time: 4PM CET | 10AM EST

Presentation and Sap Video (ondemand.com)
